title: juncus balticus subsp. littoralis
intro: Juncus balticus subsp. littoralis, also known as littoral rush or salt marsh rush, is a subspecies of the Juncus balticus plant that is typically found in salt marshes and coastal areas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Juncus balticus subsp. littoralis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions.
